Cessna: C172S (NAVIII)
Checklist

Tap the glowing control — if it's already set right, tapping VERIFIES it · hold right-click to zoom · Info for help

    ✅ Checklist complete — nicely flown.

    Calibrate mode: drag each labeled control onto its real spot in the photo. Placements save automatically. Hit Copy to send the numbers to Claude.

    Colors: green=ON/active · red=cutoff · amber=intermediate.
